race.comment: DIAMANTINA ROSE (10) was leading on the turn and fought on well to finish second over 800m at Warwick at her latest appearance. Has excellent credentials here at this journey with three top-three finishes from as many tries. Has a high cruising speed and will give a great sight. GYPSY TRICKS (8) missed the placings last start when sixth over 870m at Toowoomba. Has his share of ability and is hard to beat in this suitable race. SILK SONIC (9) finished 4 lengths from the winner in fifth last start over 1000m at Sunshine Coast, an improvement on her ninth there the run before. Has the talent to take care of this field. The well-related JACKA STANDS ALONE (6) (half to 2xG3 winner and G2 placed Raiment) was last at the races when finishing sixth over 1100m at Warwick on January 22. Has found the right race and is worth including while fresh.
